initiatives.name: Mutual Aid San Antonio
initiatives.description: Collaborative & horizontally organized. Coordinates free stores.

initiatives.name: San Antonio Mutual Aid Fund
initiatives.description: Kindness, Food Medicine and crowdfunding for Indigenous, Black, LGBTQIA, Houseless folks in need.

initiatives.name: ACT 4 SA
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization working to build community power and create transformative change in San Antonio through mutual aid, advocacy, and community organizing. They focus on police accountability, community safety, and empowering residents to participate in local decision-making.

initiatives.name: Esperanza Peace & Justice Center
initiatives.description: A community-based cultural arts and social justice organization that cultivates solidarity and mutual aid through arts, culture, and education. They work to preserve and promote artistic and cultural expression of and among marginalized communities while building networks of support

initiatives.name: Corazon San Antonio
initiatives.description: reduction outreach, housing case management, meals, clothing, showers, hygiene supplies

initiatives.name: 1UP SATX
initiatives.description: Sharing reduction supplies with communities that need them.

initiatives.name: Corazon Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: The harm reduction program from Corazan San Antonio.

initiatives.name: Suenos Sin Fronteras
initiatives.description: Sueños Sin Fronteras de Tejas aims to improve pregnancy, birth, and postpartum outcomes for undocumented people in San Antonio, Texas, through direct support, education, and advocacy.

initiatives.name: Uplift SA Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Collaboration 2 share resources across SA neighbors DM 2 get & distro free reproductive health & drug harm reduction

initiatives.name: San Antonio Mutual Aid Calendar
initiatives.description: Listings of mutual aid events, all public and free.

initiatives.name: Mootual Aid
initiatives.description: Flat autonomous grassroots herd based on direct action, solidarity, & harm reduction. Supporting various intersections.

initiatives.name: Friends That Shoot
initiatives.description: Mutual aid initiative dedicated to supporting and empowering queer and trans individuals in San Antonio.
